{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "High volume of registry key creations in a user's CurrentVersion hive (HKU\\S-1-5-21-...\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Cu), combined with network connections to LDAP (port 389) and RPC (port 135) ports. This pattern can indicate reconnaissance, persistence, or configuration changes by a script.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell",
    "reg_create",
    "HKU",
    "network_connect",
    "LDAP",
    "RPC"
  ]
}
